TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Turkmenistan, title = Turkmenistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turkmenistan} }

S.FORM: Turkmenistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 00 N, 60 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 488,100 sq km (maki' tay 53ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 469,930 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 18,170 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,291,317. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga72% , lhlahuy hya' ga 8.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 19.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ashgabat. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 27 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, aring ryax 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Turkmenistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 40 00 N, 60 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 488,100 sq km (maki' tay 53ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 469,930 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 18,170 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,291,317. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga72% , lhlahuy hya' ga 8.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 19.20%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ashgabat. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 27 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, aring ryax 21 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: turkmenis~ɕtan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕħɣaβat. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mawpuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ɣurβaŋulj βer*imuħame*ow, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
